notes: established org, releases, active; repo-authenticity baseline
legit repo; repo-level only, no bounty contention here
2.5y-old ASSIGNED bounty w/ solution PR #515; the original false-green case. Ground truth: do not engage. Tests both the assigned-availability veto and the absent-Algora-table -> never-green rule.

source: live probe 2026-06-04 (search: 144 open bounty issues from owner)
notes: Industrial bounty farm: one owner with 144 simultaneously-open bounties cannot honor them all. Per-issue signals miss it (low risk, ~CAUTION via incidental linked PRs); the owner-flood signal is what makes it AVOID. Anchors the extreme end of the flood tiers.

source: dogfood probe 2026-06-13 + design philosophy DESIGN.md §7 'Earned trust'
notes: Owner_age <30d bootstrap floor: trajectory cannot compensate by design (variant a). Tests the policy 'conservatism IS the feature' for blind LLM agents visiting unknown new owners. Verdict CAUTION (risk ~0.32) is the *correct* output, not a bug. Anchors the cold-start band of sig_owner_age.

source: live probe 2026-06-04 (commaai 13 open bounties at probe time, $10k Ford F-150 bounty)
notes: Real legitimate $10k bounty on a healthy 10y-old established owner; every other signal clean (push 0d, 0 assigned, healthy stars). Single-signal-block fires solely on owner_bounty_flood at 0.55 (11-25 dilution band). Documents the false-positive boundary that variant (b) or (c) of the flood-fix would address. CAUTION here is the *current* output, kept until the fix lands — flip to ENGAGE when it does.
